chooser.description: Capability for the launch-chooser window (electron/launch-chooser/**). Grants core IPC (invoke) so the window can call `get_launch_options` + `choose_launch_option`. Per-command trust is enforced in-command by window label (windows::is_allowed_window) — the Rust analog of the Electron chooserWebContentsId `isAllowedSender` gate (entry.ts:538-541) — since app-defined commands are not permission-gated in Tauri v2.

default.description: Baseline capability for the freshell main window. Grants core IPC (invoke) so the injected window.freshellDesktop shim can call the app-local `open_external_url` command. App-defined commands are not permission-gated in Tauri v2; only core/plugin commands are, hence just core:default here.

wizard.description: Capability for the setup-wizard window (electron/setup-wizard/**). Grants core IPC (invoke) so the window can call the app-local `complete_setup` command. Per-command trust is enforced in-command by window label (windows::is_allowed_window) — the Rust analog of the Electron webContents-id `isAllowedSender` gate (entry.ts:513) — since app-defined commands are not permission-gated in Tauri v2.
